mapper.sql:
SELECT B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS subLinkName , B.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , B.CONTRACT_NUM AS searchCntrNo , B.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS openAgntCd , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS openAgntNm , A.RWD_PROD_CD AS rwdProdCd , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RWD_PROD_CD) AS rwdProdNm , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS lstComActvDate , A.STRT_DTTM AS strtDttm , A.END_DTTM AS endDttm , A.CHN_CD AS chnCd , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0249', A.CHN_CD) AS chnNm , B.MODEL_NAME AS modelNm , B.MODEL_ID AS modelId , C.REQ_BUY_TYPE AS reqBuyType , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9004', C.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS reqBuyTypeNm , A.IMEI AS imei , A.IMEI_TWO AS imeiTwo , B.SCAN_ID AS scanId , C.RES_NO AS resNo , A.BUY_PRIC AS buyPric , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS custNm , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', B.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatusNm , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS openDt , A.RWD_SEQ AS rwdSeq , CAN_RSLT_CD AS canRsltCd , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0262', A.CAN_RSLT_CD) AS canRsltNm , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0265', A.RWD_STAT_CD) AS rwdStatCd , B.INTM_SRL_NO AS intmSrlNo , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0259', (SELECT RWD_PRD FROM MSP_RWD_MST WHERE RWD_PROD_CD = A.RWD_PROD_CD)) AS rwdPrd , TO_DATE(SUBSTR(END_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SYSDATE) || '일' AS leftPrd FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, MSP_REQUEST_DTL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.RWD_STAT_CD = '1'
AND A.END_DTTM BETWEEN #{searchFromDt} || '000000' AND #{searchToDt} || '235959'
AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = #{searchRwdProdCd}
AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(END_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SYSDATE) BETWEEN 0 AND TO_NUMBER(#{searchTermCd})
AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal}
AND B.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE #{searchVal} || '%'
AND B.SUBSCRIBER_NO = REPLACE(#{searchVal},'-')
ORDER BY A.STRT_DTTM, B.SUB_LINK_NAME
mapper.select: /* RwdMemberMapper.getRwdMemImeiCnt */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER WHERE 1 = 1 AND (IMEI IN (#{imei}, #{imeiTwo}) OR IMEI_TWO IN (#{imei}, #{imeiTwo})) AND RWD_STAT_CD IN ('0', '1')

SELECT /* RwdMemberMapper.getFile1 */ FILE_ID /* 파일명 */ , FILE_EXT /* 파일 확장자 */ , FILE_DIR /* 파일 경로 */ , RWD_SEQ FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER WHERE RWD_SEQ = #{rwdSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FILE_DIR IS NOT NULL
SELECT /* RwdMemberMapper.getFileNm */ FILE_DIR AS FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER WHERE RWD_SEQ = #{rwdSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT /* RwdMemberMapper.getFileNmSeq */ TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_MSP_RWD_01.NEXTVAL, '000000')) AS FILE_NM_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0258' AND CD_VAL = #{searchRwdProdCd}
mapper.sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CMPN.PAY_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_DTTM , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0258', MEM.RWD_PROD_CD) AS RWD_PROD_NM , CMPN.ASR_PRIC , CMPN.REAL_CMPN_AMT FROM MSP_RWD_CMPN CMPN, MSP_RWD_MEMBER MEM, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE CMPN.RWD_SEQ = MEM.RWD_SEQ AND MEM.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM
AND CMPN.PAY_DTTM BETWEEN #{searchFromDt} || '000000' AND #{searchToDt} || '235959'
AND MEM.RWD_PROD_CD = #{searchRwdProdCd}
AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal}
AND SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE #{searchVal} || '%'
AND SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO = REPLACE(#{searchVal},'-')
ORDER BY CMPN.PAY_DTTM DESC
